message:
style(trace): apply clippy lint fixes to event and integrity modules

Three minor clippy-driven cleanups:

- event.rs: Use inline format arg `{kind:?}` instead of positional
  `"{:?}", kind` in assert message for required_fields test
- event.rs: Use char literal '@' instead of string literal "@" in
  single-character contains() call, avoiding unnecessary &str → Pattern
  conversion
- integrity.rs: Replace `collect::<Vec<_>>()` + `.len()` with `.count()`
  on the fatal_issues() iterator, eliminating an unnecessary heap
  allocation just to count elements

No behavioral changes; all existing tests continue to pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
